title: Kenyan Cheese Gratin
description: A flavorful and comforting casserole inspired by Kenyan cuisine, featuring a rich cheese gratin and a hint of smokiness.
instructions: In a medium saucepan, melt 2 tablespoons of butter over medium heat.
Add the grated gratin and stir until lightly browned. Set aside.
In a separate saucepan, combine the Kenyan cheese, Stilton cheese, smoked paprika, and cayenne pepper.
Stir until the cheese is melted and smooth.
In a greased 9x13-inch baking dish, create a thin layer of the cheese mixture.
Top with the grated gratin mixture, followed by another layer of the cheese mixture.
Repeat this process one more time, finishing with a layer of cheese on top.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the casserole is heated through.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 5-10 minutes before serving.
